item.description: A collection of plugins and wrappers for popular build tools and frameworks. Architectural overview of the Integrations domain in the tailwindcss codebase. Contains 17 source files.

item.title: NodeBinding Domain — tailwindcss Architecture
item.description: The NAPI-RS bridge that exposes the high-performance Rust logic to the Node.js environment. Architectural overview of the NodeBinding domain in the tailwindcss codebase. Contains 2 source files.

item.title: OxideCore Domain — tailwindcss Architecture
item.description: The high-performance Rust core responsible for scanning source files and extracting CSS utility candidates. Architectural overview of the OxideCore domain in the tailwindcss codebase. Contains 276 source files.

item.title: TailwindCLI Domain — tailwindcss Architecture
item.description: The command-line interface for standalone and node-based CSS compilation. Architectural overview of the TailwindCLI domain in the tailwindcss codebase. Contains 10 source files.

item.title: TailwindNode Domain — tailwindcss Architecture
item.description: The primary Node.js runtime logic for compiling CSS and managing module dependencies. Architectural overview of the TailwindNode domain in the tailwindcss codebase. Contains 17 source files.
